answer: The PitchBook MCP server integrates PitchBook’s private capital market intelligence into AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT [1][2]. It enables users to perform natural language queries for company profiles, deal histories, funding rounds, and investor information directly within their AI workflows [1][2]. The server functions as a bridge that allows the AI to discover and invoke tools, returning structured data and referenced insights [2]. Deployment typically utilizes OAuth 2.1 for secure entitlement checks, ensuring only licensed users access premium financial data [2]. It is accessible via standard MCP-compatible clients and the ChatGPT Apps SDK [3][2].
